From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Pakistani entertainment television channel

Television channel

Geo Entertainment

***Geo Entertainment*** or ***Har Pal Geo*** is a Pakistani entertainment television channel established by [Geo Television Network](/wiki/Geo_Television_Network "Geo Television Network") in May 2002.[[1]](#cite_note-1) Its test transmission started on 14 August 2002 on the PAS 10 digital satellite whereas on 1 October 2002[[2]](#cite_note-2) the regular transmission of Geo Entertainment was started.

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Geo_Entertainment&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

Established in 2002, Geo is among the oldest Pakistani private TV networks, and has received good TRPs on various daily soaps, reality series, and drama serials since its inception. Geo broadcast many daily soaps during its initial years and the soaps became popular too. Some shows from the 2000s that aired on the network which are still recognized include *Tere Pehlu Main*, *[Meri Zaat Zarra-e-Benishan](/wiki/Meri_Zaat_Zarra-e-Benishan "Meri Zaat Zarra-e-Benishan")*, *[Kaash Main Teri Beti Na Hoti](/wiki/Kaash_Main_Teri_Beti_Na_Hoti "Kaash Main Teri Beti Na Hoti")*, *Tum Ho Kay Chup*, *[Doraha](/wiki/Doraha_(TV_series) "Doraha (TV series)")*, *[Yeh Zindagi Hai](/wiki/Yeh_Zindagi_Hai "Yeh Zindagi Hai")* and various more.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

The channel continued to do well in ratings but in 2014 the network was banned in the country for promoting blasphemy on its morning show *[Utho Jago Pakistan](/wiki/Utho_Jago_Pakistan "Utho Jago Pakistan")*.[[4]](#cite_note-4)[[5]](#cite_note-5)[[6]](#cite_note-6) The channel was eventually unbanned but the ratings took a hit and the channel was panned for making below average content, and it took a while for the channel to get back onto the charts with well ratings. In 2017, GEO launched *[Khaani](/wiki/Khaani "Khaani")* and the series went on to become a huge success for the network with worldwide success and was later added on [Netflix](/wiki/Netflix "Netflix") due to its major popularity.[[7]](#cite_note-7) Similarly, around the same time *[Ghar Titli Ka Par](/wiki/Ghar_Titli_Ka_Par "Ghar Titli Ka Par")* was also a big success for the network domestically and garnered many views on [YouTube](/wiki/YouTube "YouTube")[[8]](#cite_note-8) as well. The two drama serials helped GEO break ground just like it did before its ban and become the most viewed channel in Pakistan. Since that time, Geo joined hands with [7th Sky Entertainment](/wiki/7th_Sky_Entertainment "7th Sky Entertainment") and has produced various shows that have been record-breaking on television and social media platforms.[[9]](#cite_note-9)

In 2019, the network created two records for the most watched show in the 9:00 pm slot with the beginning of [*Bharosa Pyar Tera*](/wiki/Bharosa_Pyar_Tera "Bharosa Pyar Tera") and ending of *[Dil-e-Gumshuda](/wiki/Dil-e-Gumshuda "Dil-e-Gumshuda")*, both the series garnered 17.0 TRP[[10]](#cite_note-10) In 2020, [*Munafiq*](/wiki/Munafiq_(TV_series) "Munafiq (TV series)") created a record for the most watched show in the 7:00 pm slot with 22.75 TRP, and is also the second highest rated serial in the history of Pakistani television, as well as being in the top trending list in India on YouTube.[[11]](#cite_note-11) In recent times, criticism of Geo Entertainment includes the flak for its low picture quality on television compared to [HUM HD](/wiki/Hum_TV "Hum TV") and [ARY Digital HD](/wiki/ARY_Digital "ARY Digital") , which are of higher quality, and making very Indian-ized dramas by copying daily soaps from [Indian networks](/wiki/Television_in_India "Television in India") and turning them into weekly drama serials or daily soaps as well[[12]](#cite_note-12) in order to get ratings.[[13]](#cite_note-13)

After the [Pakistan Stock Exchange attack](/wiki/Pakistan_Stock_Exchange_attack "Pakistan Stock Exchange attack") in July 2020, the attacker's car was found in a later episode of the channel's show, *[Deewangi](/wiki/Deewangi "Deewangi")* and sparked a reaction from audiences due to the strange coincidence.[[14]](#cite_note-14)[[15]](#cite_note-15)

## Programming

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Geo_Entertainment&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Programming")]

Main article: [List of programs broadcast by Geo Entertainment](/wiki/List_of_programs_broadcast_by_Geo_Entertainment "List of programs broadcast by Geo Entertainment")

Popular programming which have gotten ratings as well as international popularity in recent years includes: *Mohabbat Tumse Nafrat Hai*, [*Piya Naam Ka Diya*](/wiki/Piya_Naam_Ka_Diya "Piya Naam Ka Diya"), *[Ramz-e-Ishq](/wiki/Ramz-e-Ishq "Ramz-e-Ishq")*, [*Yaariyan*](/wiki/Yaariyan_(TV_series) "Yaariyan (TV series)"), [*Meharposh*](/wiki/Mehar_Posh "Mehar Posh"), *Aye Dil Tu Bata*, *[Deewangi](/wiki/Deewangi "Deewangi")*, [*Kahin Deep Jalay*](/wiki/Kahin_Deep_Jaley "Kahin Deep Jaley"), [*Rang Mahal*](/wiki/Rang_Mahal_(TV_series) "Rang Mahal (TV series)"), [*Khuda Aur Muhabbat*](/wiki/Khuda_Aur_Muhabbat "Khuda Aur Muhabbat") and many more. The network also has various series on [Amazon Prime Video](/wiki/Amazon_Prime_Video "Amazon Prime Video") such as *[Hiddat](/wiki/Hiddat "Hiddat")* and *[Yaar-e-Bewafa](/wiki/Yaar-e-Bewafa "Yaar-e-Bewafa")*.[[16]](#cite_note-16)
